intro: GTUPEDIA is built and maintained by GTU students from colleges across Gujarat. We organise papers, resources, and tools so every branch can find what they need faster.
joinNote: Want to contribute? Apply as a Campus Ambassador or reach out to the team — we welcome students from any GTU-affiliated college.
